must_not_claim: UI can complete end-to-end workflows without Core CLI

p1_blockers.reason: UI validates and builds, but it is explicitly mock-only and cannot operate workspace setup, file selection, KB build, query/verify, document generation, Agent runtime, storage/memory reports, or provider settings end to end.

recommended_fix_before_v4: Implement a real local operation bridge or explicitly redefine v4.0 as contract-viewer RC. Until then, do not claim full Local Knowledge Workbench RC.
